question: Which age group holds the largest market share in the most recent year shown?

options.A: The green segment represents the dominant age group.
options.B: The purple segment represents the dominant age group.
options.C: The orange segment represents the dominant age group.
options.D: Cannot determine which age group holds the largest share without a legend to explain what each color represents.

explanation: The chart displays different colored segments but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category has the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
